operational_scenes.scene_title: Explanation of Potential and Destination in Sorting
operational_scenes.primary_intent: Clarify the meaning of potential destinations and sorting destinations
operational_intents: Define potential destinations in UPS sorting
Explain how multiple destinations relate to load types
Describe the concept of sorted destination codes
operational_scenes.knowledge_extraction_strategy: Extract definitions and relationships of sorting terms
operational_scenes.why_this_strategy: Clarifies key sorting terminology and system logic

operational_scenes.scene_title: Role of ASX System and Destination Mapping
operational_scenes.primary_intent: Describe the ASX system's function in destination determination
operational_intents: Explain how ASX maps zip codes to destinations
Discuss dynamic nature of destination assignments
operational_scenes.knowledge_extraction_strategy: Extract system roles and mapping logic
operational_scenes.why_this_strategy: Details system interactions for destination assignment

operational_scenes.primary_intent: Explain the critical role of sort confirmation messages
operational_intents: Describe how parcels are sorted to tote locations
Explain the triggering of sort confirmation messages
Highlight consequences of missing confirmation messages
operational_scenes.knowledge_extraction_strategy: Extract message flow and operational impact
operational_scenes.why_this_strategy: Captures critical communication for sorting accuracy

operational_scenes.scene_title: Software Tracking of Tote Contents and Volume
operational_scenes.primary_intent: Detail software processes for tote content and fullness tracking
operational_intents: Explain updating parcel counts in totes
Describe dimension data scaling for different package types
Define fullness thresholds for tote management
operational_scenes.knowledge_extraction_strategy: Extract software logic for tote volume management
operational_scenes.why_this_strategy: Captures operational rules for tote capacity monitoring
